```{r}
library("DHARMa") #contains simulateResiduals(), testUniformity(), testOutliers()

model_diagnostics <- function(model) {
# PLOTS: VISUAL CHECKS
  
  # Residuals vs. Fitted plot for linearity and homoskedasticity
  plot(check_model(model, check="linearity"))
  
  # Normal Q-Q plot for normality of residuals
  plot(check_model(model, check="qq"))
  
  # Histogram for normality of residuals
  hist(resid(model), breaks="FD", probability=TRUE)
  curve(dnorm(x, mean=mean(resid(model)), sd=sd(resid(model))), add=TRUE, lwd=1) #normal curve overlay
  
  # Check global model fit: uniformity and homoskedasticity of residuals
  plot(simulateResiduals(model))
  
  # Check for many outliers
  print(testOutliers(simulateResiduals(model)))
  
  # Normality of random effects (random intercepts)
  qqnorm(ranef(model)$ID[,1], main="Normal Q-Q Plot for Random Intercepts") 
  qqline(ranef(model)$ID[,1])
  
  # Test multicollinearity among predictors (in interaction models) and among covariates
  print(vif(model))
  
  #check LMM convergence and singularity
  print(c("Singularity",check_singularity(model)))
  print(c("Convergence",check_convergence(model)))
}
```


Test collinearity of covariates
```{r}
#make correlation matrix of covariates; exclude Education because not numeric
covariate.corr <- corr.test(BrainCovWMHTownsend.df2[,c(2,3,4,6,10,11,17,22,25,26,28,41,49)], use = "pairwise")
#show r and p-values
cbind(covariate.corr$r,covariate.corr$p)

#Highest correlations include:
  #PA with time outdoors r=0.36, p=0.000
  #CVD_problems and WMH volume (T2) at r=0.24, p=2.96e-31
  #Age and WMH volume (T2) at r=0.38, p=2.0e-78
  #Age and Income at r=-0.26, p=5.8e-13
```


# 6) Linear mixed effects models for the association of natural environment with brain volume changes: LARGER DATASET using Townsend Deprivation Index; Time as CATEGORICAL
* MRI was done for ~50,000 participants at T2 versus only ~5000 at T3, so this would be too much missing data at T3 for maximum likelihood estimation of missing data. Therefore, restrict the LMM sample to those with complete brain data at both T2 and T3 (complete case analyses). 
* LMMs will only use random intercepts (for Subject); random slopes for Time make the model over-parameterized because only 2 timepoints.

## 6.0) Prepare modified dataset

Reformat data to long format
```{r}
library(tidyr) #contains pivot_longer()

#Select variables of interest for analysis
BrainCov.long<-BrainCov[c(1,113,4,11,112,94,5,6,108,109,106,107,102,103,101,105,100,111,104,114,115,118,97:99,119,110,122,123,120,121,124,125,128,129,132,133,146,147,150,151,91:93,152:154,155,156)]

#Pivot only the brain outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
BrainCov.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=BrainCov.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest",
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)
```

Reformat data to long format: sample with complete WMH data
```{r}
#Select variables of interest for analysis
BrainCovWMH.long <- BrainCovWMH[c(1,113,4,11,112,94,5,6,108,109,106,107,102,103,101,105,100,111,104,114,115,118,97:99,119,110,122,123,120,121,124,125,128,129,132,133,146,147,150,151,91:93,152:154,155,156)]

#Pivot only the brain outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
BrainCovWMH.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=BrainCovWMH.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest",
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)
```

Reformat data to long format: Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index instead of Index of Multiple Deprivation
```{r}
#Select variables of interest for analysis
BrainCovTownsend.long <- BrainCovTownsend[c(1,113,4,11,112,94,5,6,108,109,106,107,102,103,101,105,100,111,104,114,115,118,97:99,119,110,122,123,120,121,124,125,128,129,132,133,146,147,150,151,91:93,152:154,155,156)]

#Pivot only the brain outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
BrainCovTownsend.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=BrainCovTownsend.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest",
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)
```


Reformat data to long format: Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index instead of Index of Multiple Deprivation, and with complete WMH data
```{r}
#Select variables of interest for analysis
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long <- BrainCovWMHTownsend[c(1,113,4,11,112,94,5,6,108,109,106,107,102,103,101,105,100,111,104,114,115,118,97:99,119,110,122,123,120,121,124,125,128,129,132,133,146,147,150,151,91:93,152:154,155,156)]

#Pivot only the brain outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=BrainCovWMHTownsend.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest",
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)
```

Re-scale or recode variables to facilitate interpretation.
1. Every unit of age represents 10 years above the mean age
2. Every unit of BMI represents 5 kg/m^2 above the mean BMI
3. Every unit of natural environment represents a %10 increase in natural environment
4. Education kept as nominal. Alternative: Education levels recoded to numeric (ordinal). Levels ranked approximately following The Frameworks for Higher Education Qualifications of UK Degree-Awarding Bodies.
```{r}
library(dplyr)

BrainCov.long2 <-BrainCov.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3")),
         Time_continuous = case_when(Time == "2" ~ 0,
                                     Time == "3" ~ time_between_MRIs),
         Age = scale(Age, scale=FALSE)/10,
         Sex = dplyr::recode(Sex,
                      "Female" = 0.5,
                      "Male" = -0.5),
         BMI = scale(BMI, scale=FALSE)/5,
         Race = dplyr::recode(Race,
                       "White" = 0.5,
                       "Mixed" = -0.5,
                       "Black or Black British"= -0.5,
                       "Asian or Asian British"= -0.5),
         Income = as.numeric(factor(Income,
                                    levels = c("<18,000 GBP","18,000-30,999 GBP","31,000-51,999 GBP","52,000-100,000 GBP",">100,000 GBP"))),
         Disability = dplyr::recode(Disability, 
                             "Yes" = 1,
                             "No" = 0),
         Diabetes = dplyr::recode(Diabetes,
                           "Yes" = 1,
                           "No" = 0),
         CVD_problems = dplyr::recode(CVD_problems,
                               "Yes" = 1,
                               "No" = 0),
         Cancer = dplyr::recode(Cancer,
                         "Yes" = 1,
                         "No" = 0),
         Other_medical_conditions =  dplyr::recode(Other_medical_conditions,
                                            "Yes" = 1,
                                            "No" = 0),
         Alcohol = as.numeric(factor(Alcohol,
                                     levels = c("Never","Previous drinker","Current drinker"))),
         Smoking = as.numeric(factor(Smoking,
                                     levels = c("Never", "Previous Smoker", "Current Smoker"))),
         Population_density = as.numeric(factor(Population_density,
                                                levels = c("Urban area", "Town", "Village, Hamlet, or Rural Area"))),
         Education_ordinal = as.numeric(factor(Education,
levels = c("None of the above", "CSEs or equivalent", "O levels/General Certificate of Secondary Education or equivalent","A levels/AS levels or equivalent", "NVQ or HND or HNC or equivalent", "Other professional qualifications", "College or University Degree"))),
         Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_300m/10,
         Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_300m/10
         )

detach(package:dplyr,unload=TRUE)
```

Re-scale or recode variables to facilitate interpretation. [Sample requiring complete WMH data]
1. Every unit of age represents 10 years above the mean age
2. Every unit of BMI represents 5 kg/m^2 above the mean BMI
3. Every unit of natural environment represents a %10 increase in natural environment
4. Education kept as nominal. Alternative: Education levels recoded to numeric (ordinal). Levels ranked approximately following The Frameworks for Higher Education Qualifications of UK Degree-Awarding Bodies.
```{r}
library(dplyr)

BrainCovWMH.long2 <-BrainCovWMH.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3")),
         Time_continuous = case_when(Time == "2" ~ 0,
                                     Time == "3" ~ time_between_MRIs),
         Age = scale(Age, scale=FALSE)/10,
         Sex = dplyr::recode(Sex,
                      "Female" = 0.5,
                      "Male" = -0.5),
         BMI = scale(BMI, scale=FALSE)/5,
         Race = dplyr::recode(Race,
                       "White" = 0.5,
                       "Mixed" = -0.5,
                       "Black or Black British"= -0.5,
                       "Asian or Asian British"= -0.5),
         Income = as.numeric(factor(Income,
                                    levels = c("<18,000 GBP","18,000-30,999 GBP","31,000-51,999 GBP","52,000-100,000 GBP",">100,000 GBP"))),
         Disability = dplyr::recode(Disability, 
                             "Yes" = 1,
                             "No" = 0),
         Diabetes = dplyr::recode(Diabetes,
                           "Yes" = 1,
                           "No" = 0),
         CVD_problems = dplyr::recode(CVD_problems,
                               "Yes" = 1,
                               "No" = 0),
         Cancer = dplyr::recode(Cancer,
                         "Yes" = 1,
                         "No" = 0),
         Other_medical_conditions =  dplyr::recode(Other_medical_conditions,
                                            "Yes" = 1,
                                            "No" = 0),
         Alcohol = as.numeric(factor(Alcohol,
                                     levels = c("Never","Previous drinker","Current drinker"))),
         Smoking = as.numeric(factor(Smoking,
                                     levels = c("Never", "Previous Smoker", "Current Smoker"))),
         Population_density = as.numeric(factor(Population_density,
                                                levels = c("Urban area", "Town", "Village, Hamlet, or Rural Area"))),
         Education_ordinal = as.numeric(factor(Education,
levels = c("None of the above", "CSEs or equivalent", "O levels/General Certificate of Secondary Education or equivalent","A levels/AS levels or equivalent", "NVQ or HND or HNC or equivalent", "Other professional qualifications", "College or University Degree"))),
         Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_300m/10,
         Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_300m/10
         )

detach(package:dplyr,unload=TRUE)
```

Re-scale or recode variables to facilitate interpretation. [Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index instead of Index of Multiple Deprivation]
1. Every unit of age represents 10 years above the mean age
2. Every unit of BMI represents 5 kg/m^2 above the mean BMI
3. Every unit of natural environment represents a %10 increase in natural environment
4. Education kept as nominal. Alternative: Education levels recoded to numeric (ordinal). Levels ranked approximately following The Frameworks for Higher Education Qualifications of UK Degree-Awarding Bodies.
```{r}
library(dplyr)

BrainCovTownsend.long2 <-BrainCovTownsend.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3")),
         Time_continuous = case_when(Time == "2" ~ 0,
                                     Time == "3" ~ time_between_MRIs),
         Age = scale(Age, scale=FALSE)/10,
         Sex = dplyr::recode(Sex,
                      "Female" = 0.5,
                      "Male" = -0.5),
         BMI = scale(BMI, scale=FALSE)/5,
         Race = dplyr::recode(Race,
                       "White" = 0.5,
                       "Mixed" = -0.5,
                       "Black or Black British"= -0.5,
                       "Asian or Asian British"= -0.5),
         Income = as.numeric(factor(Income,
                                    levels = c("<18,000 GBP","18,000-30,999 GBP","31,000-51,999 GBP","52,000-100,000 GBP",">100,000 GBP"))),
         Disability = dplyr::recode(Disability, 
                             "Yes" = 1,
                             "No" = 0),
         Diabetes = dplyr::recode(Diabetes,
                           "Yes" = 1,
                           "No" = 0),
         CVD_problems = dplyr::recode(CVD_problems,
                               "Yes" = 1,
                               "No" = 0),
         Cancer = dplyr::recode(Cancer,
                         "Yes" = 1,
                         "No" = 0),
         Other_medical_conditions =  dplyr::recode(Other_medical_conditions,
                                            "Yes" = 1,
                                            "No" = 0),
         Alcohol = as.numeric(factor(Alcohol,
                                     levels = c("Never","Previous drinker","Current drinker"))),
         Smoking = as.numeric(factor(Smoking,
                                     levels = c("Never", "Previous Smoker", "Current Smoker"))),
         Population_density = as.numeric(factor(Population_density,
                                                levels = c("Urban area", "Town", "Village, Hamlet, or Rural Area"))),
         Education_ordinal = as.numeric(factor(Education,
levels = c("None of the above", "CSEs or equivalent", "O levels/General Certificate of Secondary Education or equivalent","A levels/AS levels or equivalent", "NVQ or HND or HNC or equivalent", "Other professional qualifications", "College or University Degree"))),
         Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_300m/10,
         Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_300m/10
         )

#Add non-time-varying variable for WMH at first MRI
BrainCovTownsend.long2 <- BrainCovTownsend.long2 %>%
    group_by(ID) %>%
    mutate(WMH_firstMRI = dplyr::first(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted[Time == "2"]))

detach(package:dplyr,unload=TRUE)
```

Re-scale or recode variables to facilitate interpretation. Convert scaled variables back to numeric after scaling. [Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index and requiring complete WMH data]
1. Every unit of age represents 10 years above the mean age
2. Every unit of BMI represents 5 kg/m^2 above the mean BMI
3. Every unit of natural environment represents a %10 increase in natural environment
4. Education kept as nominal. Alternative: Education levels recoded to numeric (ordinal). Levels ranked approximately following The Frameworks for Higher Education Qualifications of UK Degree-Awarding Bodies.
```{r}
library(dplyr)

BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2 <-BrainCovWMHTownsend.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3")),
         Time_continuous = case_when(Time == "2" ~ 0,
                                     Time == "3" ~ time_between_MRIs),
         Age = as.numeric(scale(Age, scale=FALSE)/10),
         Sex = dplyr::recode(Sex,
                      "Female" = 0.5,
                      "Male" = -0.5),
         BMI = as.numeric(scale(BMI, scale=FALSE)/5),
         Race = dplyr::recode(Race,
                       "White" = 0.5,
                       "Mixed" = -0.5,
                       "Black or Black British"= -0.5,
                       "Asian or Asian British"= -0.5),
         Income = as.numeric(factor(Income,
                                    levels = c("<18,000 GBP","18,000-30,999 GBP","31,000-51,999 GBP","52,000-100,000 GBP",">100,000 GBP"))),
         Disability = dplyr::recode(Disability, 
                             "Yes" = 1,
                             "No" = 0),
         Diabetes = dplyr::recode(Diabetes,
                           "Yes" = 1,
                           "No" = 0),
         CVD_problems = dplyr::recode(CVD_problems,
                               "Yes" = 1,
                               "No" = 0),
         Cancer = dplyr::recode(Cancer,
                         "Yes" = 1,
                         "No" = 0),
         Other_medical_conditions =  dplyr::recode(Other_medical_conditions,
                                            "Yes" = 1,
                                            "No" = 0),
         Alcohol = as.numeric(factor(Alcohol,
                                     levels = c("Never","Previous drinker","Current drinker"))),
         Smoking = as.numeric(factor(Smoking,
                                     levels = c("Never", "Previous Smoker", "Current Smoker"))),
         Population_density = as.numeric(factor(Population_density,
                                                levels = c("Urban area", "Town", "Village, Hamlet, or Rural Area"))),
         Education_ordinal = as.numeric(factor(Education,
levels = c("None of the above", "CSEs or equivalent", "O levels/General Certificate of Secondary Education or equivalent","A levels/AS levels or equivalent", "NVQ or HND or HNC or equivalent", "Other professional qualifications", "College or University Degree"))),
         Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_1000m/10,
         Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = Natural_environment_pcnt_300m/10,
         Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = Greenspace_pcnt_300m/10
         )

#Add non-time-varying variable for WMH at first MRI
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2 <- BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2 %>%
    group_by(ID) %>%
    mutate(WMH_firstMRI = dplyr::first(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted[Time == "2"]))

detach(package:dplyr,unload=TRUE)
```


## 6.1) 1000m nature exposure buffer

### 6.1.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

Graph **EDIT!!!**
```{r}

```

### 6.1.2) White matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.lmm4)
anova(wm.lmm4)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.lmm4, var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

```{r}
#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
wm.lmm5 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(wm.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt",
                       at = list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10))
                       )

#Convert to data frame
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆White matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()

```

#### Sensitivity: Add Hearing problems as covariate
```{r}
wm.hearing.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Hearing_difficulty + Other_medical_conditions + Cancer + Diabetes + Clots_Asthma_Allergies + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE) #Bipolar_Depression + Cancer + Diabetes + Clots_Asthma_Allergies + Alcohol

summary(wm.hearing.lmm)
anova(wm.hearing.lmm)

confint(wm.hearing.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age instead of continuous
Add CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge <- BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2
#Median-split dichotomous age variable
#summary(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$Age) #Median 54 = 0.06292 after scaling; Mean 53.37 = 0.00 after scaling
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$AgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$Age<=0.06292] <- "Younger"
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$AgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$Age>0.06292] <- "Older" 
#LMM with binary, median-split Age
wm.binAge.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + AgeBinary + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.binAge.lmm)
anova(wm.binAge.lmm)
confint(wm.binAge.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age/Sex grouping instead of separate Age and Sex variables
Add CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
#Add new variable to existing long-format dataset: BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2
#Alternative: could use explainAgeSex dataset (already prepared) and convert to long format

#Determine median age
#summary(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.AgeSex$Age) #Median 54 = 0.06292 after scaling; Mean 53.37 = 0.00 after scaling

#Prepare the 4-level categorical variable combining median-split Age with Sex. Note: sex was recoded in Section 5: Female = 0.5, Male = -0.5.
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$SexAgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age<=0.06292 & BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Sex==0.5] <- "Females Younger"
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$SexAgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age<=0.06292 & BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Sex==-0.5] <- "Males Younger"
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$SexAgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age>0.06292 & BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Sex==0.5] <- "Females Older"
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$SexAgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age>0.06292 & BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Sex==-0.5] <- "Males Older"

#LMM with binary, median-split Age
wm.AgeSex.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + SexAgeBinary + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.AgeSex.lmm)
anova(wm.AgeSex.lmm)
confint(wm.AgeSex.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 6.1.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 6.1.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

### 6.1.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.sex.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.1.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.sex.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.1.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.sex.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.1.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.sex.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.1.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.1.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.age.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.1.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.1.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.1.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.sex.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Time*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.lmm4)
anova(gm.sex.age.lmm4)
confint(gm.sex.age.lmm4,"Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:Age")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.lmm4, ~Time|Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt|Sex|Age)

library(lmerTest) #contains emtrends()

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm4, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-1,0,1)))
summary(emm_trends)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at age QUARTILES: 1stQu = -0.637, mean=0, 3rdQu=0.563
emm_trends2 <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm4, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-0.637,0,0.563)))
summary(emm_trends2)
```

Plot brain volume as function of nature, by timepoint and by age %ile
```{r}
#Plot with separate trendlines for age 1stQu = -0.631, mean=0, 3rdQu=0.569
  #get emms at each Age quartile for each Time*Sex
  emms <- emmeans(gm.sex.age.lmm4, ~Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt | Time*Sex*Age, at =list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt=seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.637,0,0.563)))
  emms.df <- as.data.frame((emms))
  #Label time and sex levels
  emms.df$Time <- factor(emms.df$Time, levels = c(2, 3), labels = c("First MRI", "Second MRI"))
  emms.df$Sex <- factor(emms.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
  emms.df$Age <- factor(emms.df$Age, levels = c(-0.637,0,0.563), labels = c("25th %ile", "Mean", "75th %ile"))
  
  #plot
  ggplot(emms.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = emmean, color = Age, fill=Age, group = interaction(Time, Sex, Age))) +
    geom_line(size = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL, fill = Age), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
    facet_grid(Sex ~ Time) +
    labs(
      x = "Natural Environment buffered to 300m (10%ile)",
      y = "Grey Matter Volume, head-size adjusted (mm^3)",
      color = "Age",
      fill = "Age") +
    theme_minimal()
```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in age for plot
#sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #sd=0.72199

#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.722,0.722))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.722,0.722), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD", "Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Age × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age instead of continuous
Includes CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
#Median-split dichotomous age variable
#summary(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge$Age) #Median 54 = 0.06292 after scaling; Mean 53.37 = 0.00 after scaling
#use dataset: BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge, which contains variable "AgeBinary"

#LMM with binary, median-split Age
gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*AgeBinary + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm,"Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:AgeBinary")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm, ~Time|Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt|Sex|AgeBinary)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.binAge.lmm, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","AgeBinary"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-1,0,1)))
summary(emm_trends)
```


#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age/Sex grouping instead of separate Age and Sex variables
Includes CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*SexAgeBinary + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

anova(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.lmm,"Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Time3:SexAgeBinary")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.lmm, ~Time|Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt|SexAgeBinary)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.lmm, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","SexAgeBinary"),
                       )
summary(emm_trends)
```

### 6.1.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.sex.age.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.lmm4)

confint(wm.sex.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.1.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.lmm4)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.1.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.lmm4)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.1.17) p-value adjustment for multiple comparisons
See section 7.2.17

### 6.1.18) Model assumption checks: 1000m buffer

#### Main associations
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by age
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.lmm4)
```


## 6.2) 300m nature exposure buffer

### 6.2.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 6.2.2) White matter volume [p=0.06]

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.300.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.300.lmm4)
anova(wm.300.lmm4)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.300.lmm4, var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age instead of continuous
Includes CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
#LMM with binary, median-split Age
wm.binAge.300.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + AgeBinary + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.binAge.300.lmm)
anova(wm.binAge.300.lmm)
confint(wm.binAge.300.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age/Sex grouping instead of separate Age and Sex variables
Includes CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
#LMM with binary, median-split Age
wm.AgeSex.300.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + SexAgeBinary + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.AgeSex.300.lmm)
anova(wm.AgeSex.300.lmm)
confint(wm.AgeSex.300.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 6.2.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems+ (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 6.2.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 6.2.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.sex.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.2.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.sex.300.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.2.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.sex.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.2.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.sex.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 6.2.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.2.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.2.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.2.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.300.lmm4)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 6.2.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
gm.sex.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Time*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4)
anova(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4)
confint(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4,"Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:Age")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4, ~Time|Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt|Sex|Age)

library(lmerTest)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-1,0,1)))
summary(emm_trends)



# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at age QUARTILES: 1stQu = -0.631, mean=0, 3rdQu=0.569
emm_trends2 <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-0.637,0,0.563)))
summary(emm_trends2)
```

Plot brain volume as function of nature, by timepoint and by age %ile
```{r}
#Plot with separate trendlines for age 1stQu = -0.631, mean=0, 3rdQu=0.569
  #get emms at each Age quartile for each Time*Sex
  emms <- emmeans(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4, ~Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt | Time*Sex*Age, at =list(Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt=seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.637,0,0.563)))
  emms.df <- as.data.frame((emms))
  #Label time and sex levels
  emms.df$Time <- factor(emms.df$Time, levels = c(2, 3), labels = c("First MRI", "Second MRI"))
  emms.df$Sex <- factor(emms.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
  emms.df$Age <- factor(emms.df$Age, levels = c(-0.637,0,0.563), labels = c("25th %ile", "Mean", "75th %ile"))
  
  #plot
  ggplot(emms.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, y = emmean, color = Age, fill=Age, group = interaction(Time, Sex, Age))) +
    geom_line(size = 1) +
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL, fill = Age), alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
    facet_grid(Sex ~ Time) +
    labs(
      x = "Natural Environment buffered to 300m (10%ile)",
      y = "Grey Matter Volume, head-size adjusted (mm^3)",
      color = "Age",
      fill = "Age") +
    theme_minimal()
```


Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in age for plot
#sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #sd=0.722

#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.300.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.300.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.722,0.722))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.722,0.722), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD", "Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Time × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age instead of continuous
Add CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
#LMM with binary, median-split Age
gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*AgeBinary + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2.binAge, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm,"Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:AgeBinary")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm, ~Time|Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt|Sex|AgeBinary)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.binAge.300.lmm, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","Sex","AgeBinary"),
                       at = list(Age = c(-1,0,1)))
summary(emm_trends)
```

#### Sensitivity: Categorical Age/Sex grouping instead of separate Age and Sex variables
Inlcude CVD problems and WMH at first MRI as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.300.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*SexAgeBinary + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

anova(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.300.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.300.lmm,"Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Time3:SexAgeBinary")
lsmeans(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.300.lmm, ~Time|Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt|SexAgeBinary)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Nature) by Time and Sex, at 10-YEAR age increments (mean +/- 10 years)
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.AgeSexCombo.300.lmm, 
                       var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", 
                       specs = c("Time","SexAgeBinary"),
                       )
summary(emm_trends)
```

### 6.2.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
wm.sex.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.300.lmm4)

confint(wm.sex.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.2.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.300.lmm4)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.2.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts model; Maximum Likelihood estimation
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.300.lmm4 <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.300.lmm4)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.300.lmm4,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 6.2.17) p-value adjustment for multiple comparisons
```{r}
#Make table of p-values for main association tests (4 brain outcomes x 2 buffer sizes)
pvals.main.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age 
pvals.age.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by sex
pvals.sex.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age and sex
pvals.age.sex.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Time3:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.300.lmm4)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#list unadjusted p-values
pvals.main.lmm
pvals.age.lmm
pvals.sex.lmm
pvals.age.sex.lmm

#Benjamini-Hochberg, assuming tests are independent
p.adjust(pvals.main.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.lmm,method="BH")

#Benjamini-Yekutieli, allows for dependency between tests (e.g., overlapping moderators (age and sex) in separate moderation tests for a given outcome)
p.adjust(pvals.main.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.lmm,method="BY")
```


### 6.2.18) Model assumption checks: 300m buffer

#### Main associations
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.300.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by age
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.300.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.300.lmm4)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.300.lmm4)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.300.lmm4)
```


# 7) Sensitivity analyses for brain volumes: LMM with categorical time; LARGER DATASET using Townsend Deprivation Index

## 7.1) LMM: Greenspace percentage instead of natural environment percentage; buffered to 1000m

### 7.1.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.1.2) White matter volume [p=0.06]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.green.lmm)
anova(wm.green.lmm)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.green.lmm, var = "Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.1.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.1.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.1.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.1.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.1.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.1.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.1.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.1.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.age.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.1.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.1.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.1.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.007]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.green.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.green.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in age for plot
#sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #sd=0.722
#Determine SD in Age for plot
  #sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #sd=0.722*10years
#Determine mean and SD in Greenspace for plot
  #mean(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt) #mean=4.71*10%
  #sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt) #sd=2.50*10%

#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

library(lmerTest) #contains function emtrands()

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Time) by Sex, at mean age +/- 1 SD and mean greenspace % +/- 1 SD
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = c(2.21,4.71,7.21), Age = c(-0.722,0.722)))
summary(emm_trends)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI) for plotting
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt = seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.722,0.722))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.722,0.722), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD","Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Time × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```


### 7.1.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.age.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.green.lmm)

confint(wm.sex.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.1.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.green.lmm)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.1.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.green.lmm)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```


## 7.2) LMM: Restrict sample to participants with no change in home location between baseline (2006–2010) and second MRI assessment (2019+) (N=1762); 1000m nature exposure buffer

Required UKB variables:

* 699 - Length of time at current address - Instance 2 (measured in units of whole years, except if answer was < 1 year, in which case the value assigned was 0.5 years)
* 53 - Date of attending assessment centre - Instances 0 and 2 (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
Approach: Include if var 699 (Instance) >= Difference in 53 (Instance 2 minus Instance 0)
Note: This is a conservative estimate of the subset of participants with no change in home address between baseline and 2014-2015. 
* ?Should we modify the above to also exclude those whose location changes during the MRI follow-up period? Check how much this reduces sample
```{r}
#include only observations with no missing data for Var 699 (T2) and Var 53 (T2 and T0)
HomeChangeTest_T2_Townsend <- subset(BrainCovTownsend.df2, !is.na(Date_attending_centre_0) & !is.na(Date_attending_centre_2) & !is.na(Time_at_current_address_T2))
length(HomeChangeTest_T2_Townsend$ID) #N=2349

#include only observations with no change in address between T2 and T0
```
