```{r}
NoHomeChange_T2_Townsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T2_Townsend,Time_at_current_address_T2 >= (round(as.numeric(Date_attending_centre_2 - Date_attending_centre_0) / 365, digits = 0)))
  #time difference between T2 and T0 is rounded to nearest year
length(NoHomeChange_T2_Townsend$ID) #N=1856

#check how many of these participants changed location between T2 and T3
HomeChange_T2_T3_Townsend <- subset(NoHomeChange_T2_Townsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 < round(time_between_MRIs, digits = 0))
  #time difference between T3 and T2 is rounded to nearest year
length(HomeChange_T2_T3_Townsend$ID) #N=65
```

Restrict sample further to participants with no change in home location between baseline assessments (2006–2010) and second MRI assessment (2019+) (N=1495)
```{r}
#include only observations with no missing data for Var 699 (T2) and Var 53 (T2 and T0)
HomeChangeTest_T3_Townsend <- subset(BrainCovTownsend.df2, !is.na(Date_attending_centre_0) & !is.na(Date_attending_centre_3) & !is.na(Time_at_current_address_T3))
length(HomeChangeTest_T3_Townsend$ID) #N=2350

#include only observations with no change in address between T3 and T0
NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T3_Townsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 >= (round(as.numeric(Date_attending_centre_3 - Date_attending_centre_0) / 365, digits = 0)))
  #time difference between T3 and T0 is rounded to nearest year
length(NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend$ID) #N=1762

#check how many participants changed home location between MRI assessments
HomeChange_T3_T2_Townsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T3_Townsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 < round(time_between_MRIs, digits = 0))
  #time difference between T3 and T2 is rounded to nearest year
length(HomeChange_T3_T2_Townsend$ID) #N=112
```

[Sample requiring complete WMH data] Restrict sample further to participants with no change in home location between baseline assessments (2006–2010) and second MRI assessment (2019+) (N=1495)
```{r}
#include only observations with no missing data for Var 699 (T2) and Var 53 (T2 and T0)
HomeChangeTest_T3_WMHTownsend <- subset(BrainCovWMHTownsend.df2, !is.na(Date_attending_centre_0) & !is.na(Date_attending_centre_3) & !is.na(Time_at_current_address_T3))
length(HomeChangeTest_T3_WMHTownsend$ID) #N=

#include only observations with no change in address between T3 and T0
NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T3_WMHTownsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 >= (round(as.numeric(Date_attending_centre_3 - Date_attending_centre_0) / 365, digits = 0)))
  #time difference between T3 and T0 is rounded to nearest year
length(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend$ID) #N=1762

#check how many participants changed home location between MRI assessments
HomeChange_T3_T2_WMHTownsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T3_WMHTownsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 < round(time_between_MRIs, digits = 0))
  #time difference between T3 and T2 is rounded to nearest year
length(HomeChange_T3_T2_WMHTownsend$ID) #N=112
```


### Compare the analytical brain+covariate data set to the restricted data set with no change in home location

No change in home location between baseline and T2 (first MRI)
```{r eval= FALSE}
#use BrainCovTownsend.df because variables (such as age, BMI, natural environment) are not yet re-scaled

#include only observations with no missing data for Var 699 and Var 53
HomeChangeTest_T2_unscaled_Townsend <- subset(BrainCovTownsend.df, !is.na(Date_attending_centre_0) & !is.na(Date_attending_centre_2) & !is.na(Time_at_current_address_T2))

#include only observations with no change in address between T2 and T0
NoHomeChange_T2_unscaled_Townsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T2_unscaled,Time_at_current_address_T2 >= (round(as.numeric(Date_attending_centre_2 - Date_attending_centre_0) / 365, digits = 0)))

NoHomeChange_T2_unscaled_Townsend$included<-"Participants with no change in home location at T2"

AnalyticalVsNoHomeChangeT2_Townsend<-rbind(BrainCovTownsend.df, NoHomeChange_T2_unscaled_Townsend)

vars2<- subset(AnalyticalVsNoHomeChangeT2_Townsend, select = c(2:42, 49,50,51))

vars2 %>% tbl_summary(
  statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                   all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
  digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
  by = "included"
) %>%
  add_p(test = list(all_continuous() ~ "t.test",
                   all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test"))
```

No change in home location between baseline and T3 (second MRI) 
```{r}
#use BrainCovTownsend.df because variables (such as age, BMI, natural environment) are not yet re-scaled

#include only observations with no missing data for Var 699 and Var 53
HomeChangeTest_T3_unscaled_Townsend <- subset(BrainCovTownsend.df, !is.na(Date_attending_centre_0) & !is.na(Date_attending_centre_3) & !is.na(Time_at_current_address_T3))

#include only observations with no change in address between T2 and T0
NoHomeChange_T3_unscaled_Townsend <- subset(HomeChangeTest_T3_unscaled_Townsend,Time_at_current_address_T3 >= (round(as.numeric(Date_attending_centre_3 - Date_attending_centre_0) / 365, digits = 0)))

NoHomeChange_T3_unscaled_Townsend$included<-"Participants with no change in home location at T3"

AnalyticalVsNoHomeChangeT3_Townsend<-rbind(BrainCovTownsend.df, NoHomeChange_T3_unscaled_Townsend)

vars3<- subset(AnalyticalVsNoHomeChangeT3_Townsend, select = c(2:42, 49,50,51))

vars3 %>% tbl_summary(
  statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                   all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)"),
  digits = all_continuous() ~ 2,
  by = "included"
) %>%
  add_p(test = list(all_continuous() ~ "t.test",
                   all_categorical() ~ "chisq.test"))
```


### Convert from wide to long format: Restricted sample with no change in home location between baseline (2004-2010) and second MRI (2019+) (N=1762)

Convert restricted dataset, NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long, to long format for LMM. [Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index instead of Index of Multiple Deprivation]
```{r}
#Select variables of interest for analysis
NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend

#Remove labels for compatibility with pivot_longer() function
for (var in names(NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long)) {
  attr(NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long[[var]], "label") <- NULL
  if ("labelled" %in% class(NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long[[var]])) {
    NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long[[var]] <- unclass(NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long[[var]])
  }
}

#Pivot only the BRAIN outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest", #keep original rows (i.e., subjects) close together;
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)

#Re-code Time as factor
NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3"))
         )

#Add non-time-varying variable for WMH at first MRI
library(dplyr)
NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_Townsend.long %>%
    group_by(ID) %>%
    mutate(WMH_firstMRI = dplyr::first(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted[Time == "2"]))
```

Convert restricted sample dataset, NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend, to long format for LMM. [Sample with true Townsend Deprivation Index instead of Index of Multiple Deprivation AND requiring WMH data]
```{r}
#Select variables of interest for analysis
NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend

#Remove labels for compatibility with pivot_longer() function
for (var in names(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long)) {
  attr(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long[[var]], "label") <- NULL
  if ("labelled" %in% class(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long[[var]])) {
    NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long[[var]] <- unclass(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long[[var]])
  }
}

#Pivot only the BRAIN outcome columns that vary over times T2 and T3
#Leave other time-varying columns in wide format: time at current address (T0,T2,T3); date attending centre (T0,T2,T3); unadjusted brain volumes (T2,T3)
NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long <- pivot_longer(
  data=NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long,
  cols=c(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T2,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T2,Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,White_matter_volume_adjusted_T3,Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_T3,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T2,Total_WMH_volume_adjusted_T3),
  cols_vary="fastest", #keep original rows (i.e., subjects) close together;
  names_to=c(".value","Time"),
  names_sep="_T", #specify regex at which to split column name
  #names_pattern= #extract regex from which new col name is derived
)

#Re-code Time as factor
NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long %>%
  mutate(Time = factor(Time, levels = c("2","3"))
         )

#Add non-time-varying variable for WMH at first MRI
NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long <- NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long %>%
    dplyr::group_by(ID) %>%
    mutate(WMH_firstMRI = dplyr::first(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted[Time == "2"]))

detach(package:dplyr,unload=TRUE)
```


### 7.2.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.2.2) White matter volume [p=0.03]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.nohomechange.lmm)
anova(wm.nohomechange.lmm)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.nohomechange.lmm, var = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of nature
```{r}
#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
wm.nohomechange.lmm5 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(wm.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = "Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt",
                       at = list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = seq(min(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10))
                       )

#Convert to data frame
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆White matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()

```


### 7.2.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.2.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.2.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.2.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.2.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.2.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.2.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.2.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume (p=0.046)

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age groups 
```{r}
#Determine SD in Age for plot
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Age) #sd=0.721*10years
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt) #sd=2.098*10%

#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
wm.age.nohomechange.lmm5 <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

library(lmerTest) #contains function emtrands()

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Time), at mean age +/- 1 SD and mean natural environment % +/- 1 SD
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = c(2.10,5.01,7.11), Age = c(-0.721,0.721)))
summary(emm_trends)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI) for plotting
slopes.time <- emtrends(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt","Age"),
                       at = list(
                         Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = seq(
                        min(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),
                        max(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),
                        length.out = 10),
                        Age = c(-0.721,0.721)
                        )
                      )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.721,0.721), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD","Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend, color = Age)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL, fill=Age), alpha = 0.2, color=NA) +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆White matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)",
    color = "Age", fill = "Age"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```

### 7.2.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.2.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.2.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI  + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")

```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in Age for plot
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Age) #sd=0.7209*10years
#Determine mean and SD in Nature for plot
  #mean(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt) #mean=5.01074*10%
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt) #sd=2.097584*10%


#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#library(lmerTest) #package for emtrends() function

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt = seq(min(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.721,0.721))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.721,0.721), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD", "Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Time × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```



### 7.2.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)

confint(wm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.2.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.2.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

## 7.3) 300m nature exposure buffer: LMM: Greenspace percentage instead of natural environment percentage

### 7.3.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.3.2) White matter volume [p=0.15]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.300.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.300.green.lmm)
anova(wm.300.green.lmm)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.300.green.lmm, var = "Greenspace_300m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.3.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems+ WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.3.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.3.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.3.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.300.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.3.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.3.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.3.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.3.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.3.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.3.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.300.green.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.3.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in Age for plot
  #sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #sd=0.722*10years
#Determine mean and SD in Greenspace for plot
  #mean(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_300m_10pcnt) #mean=3.20*10%
  #sd(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_300m_10pcnt) #sd=2.65*10%

#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

library(lmerTest) #contains function emtrands()

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes of ∆Brain/Time) by Sex, at mean age +/- 1 SD and mean greenspace % +/- 1 SD
emm_trends <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Greenspace_300m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = c(0.55,3.20,5.85), Age = c(-0.722,0.722)))
summary(emm_trends)

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI) for plotting
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Greenspace_300m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Greenspace_300m_10pcnt = seq(min(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Greenspace_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.722,0.722))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.722,0.722), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD","Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Greenspace_300m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Time × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```


### 7.3.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)

confint(wm.sex.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.3.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.3.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.300.green.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Greenspace_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.300.green.lmm,"Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.3.17) p-value adjustment for multiple comparisons
```{r}
#Make table of p-values for main association tests (4 brain outcomes x 2 buffer sizes)
pvals.main.green.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age 
pvals.age.green.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by sex
pvals.sex.green.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age and sex
pvals.age.sex.green.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.300.green.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Greenspace_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#show unadjusted p-values
pvals.main.green.lmm
pvals.age.green.lmm
pvals.sex.green.lmm
pvals.age.sex.green.lmm

#Benjamini-Hochberg, assuming tests are independent
p.adjust(pvals.main.green.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.green.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.green.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.green.lmm,method="BH")

#Benjamini-Yekutieli, allows for dependency between tests (e.g., overlapping moderators (age and sex) in separate moderation tests for a given outcome)
p.adjust(pvals.main.green.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.green.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.green.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.green.lmm,method="BY")
```


### 7.3.18) Model assumption checks: Sensitivity analysis - Greenspace instead of natural environment

#### Main associations: Greenspace, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.green.lmm)
```

#### Main associations: Greenspace, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.300.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age: Greenspace, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age: Greenspace, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.300.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex: Greenpsace, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex, Greenspace, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.300.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex: Greenspace, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.green.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex: Greenspace, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.300.green.lmm)
```


## 7.4) 300m nature exposure buffer: LMM: Restrict sample to participants with no change in home location between baseline (2006–2010) and second MRI assessment (2019+) (N=1762)

### 7.4.1) Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.4.2) White matter volume [p=0.24]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm)
anova(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm)

# Estimated marginal trends (i.e., slopes) by Time
emm_trends <- emtrends(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm, var = "Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", specs = "Time")

summary(emm_trends)

confint(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.4.3) Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```


### 7.4.4) White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature beta,SE,p,95%CI: 
confint(WMH.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt")
```

### 7.4.5) Moderation by sex: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.4.6) Moderation by sex: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.4.7) Moderation by sex: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.4.8) Moderation by sex: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Age + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*Sex beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex")
```

### 7.4.9) Moderation by age: Grey matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(gm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.4.10) Moderation by age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,SE,p,95%CI:
confint(wm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.4.11) Moderation by age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI: 
confint(hpc.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.4.12) Moderation by age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + Sex + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
  #Time*Nature*age beta,p,95%CI:  
confint(WMH.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age")
```

### 7.4.13) Moderation by sex and age: Grey matter volume [p=0.02]

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + as.numeric(BMI) + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
anova(gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
confint(gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")

```

Plot ∆brain volume/time slopes as function of Nature, over Age*Sex groups
```{r}
#Determine SD in Age for plot
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Age) #sd=0.7209*10years
#Determine mean and SD in Nature for plot
  #mean(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt) #mean=3.935*10%
  #sd(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt) #sd=2.344*10%


#Recode time as numeric (using backup dataset) to enable ∆brain volume/time slopes
model_data <- model.frame(
  ~ .,
  data = NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long,
  na.action = na.pass
)
model_data$Time_num <- as.numeric(as.character(model_data$Time)) - 2

#Re-run model
gm.sex.age.lmm5 <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time_num*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Age*Sex + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), data = model_data, REML = FALSE)

#library(lmerTest) #package for emtrends() function

#Extract slopes of ∆brain volume/time (i.e., ∆brain volume between first and second MRI)
slopes.time <- emtrends(gm.sex.age.lmm5, 
                       var = "Time_num", 
                       specs = c("Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt","Sex","Age"),
                       at = list(Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt = seq(min(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE), max(NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long$Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, na.rm = TRUE),length.out = 10), Age = c(-0.721,0.721))
                       )
slopes.time.df <- as.data.frame(slopes.time)
slopes.time.df$Sex <- factor(slopes.time.df$Sex, levels = c(-0.5, 0.5), labels = c("Male", "Female"))
slopes.time.df$Age <- factor(slopes.time.df$Age, levels=c(-0.721,0.721), labels=c("Mean Age - 1 SD", "Mean Age + 1 SD") )

#Plot
ggplot(slopes.time.df, aes(x = Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt, y = Time_num.trend)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower.CL, ymax = upper.CL), alpha = 0.2, fill= "steelblue") +
  facet_grid(Sex ~ Age) +  # 4 facets for Time × Sex
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  labs(
    x = "Natural Environment (/10%)",
    y = "∆Grey matter volume between MRIs (mm^3)"
  ) + theme_minimal()


```



### 7.4.14) Moderation by sex and age: White matter volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
wm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(wm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)

confint(wm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.4.15) Moderation by sex and age: Hippocampal volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
hpc.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(hpc.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
 
confint(hpc.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.4.16) Moderation by sex and age: White matter hyperintensity volume

Random intercepts only; Maximum Likelihood estimation; Add CVD problems and time_baseline_to_first_MRI (T0 to T2) as covariates
```{r}
WMH.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm <- lmer(Total_WMH_volume_adjusted ~ Time*Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt*Sex*Age + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + (1 | ID), NoHomeChange_T3_WMHTownsend.long, REML=FALSE)

summary(WMH.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
 
confint(WMH.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm,"Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age")
```

### 7.4.17) p-value adjustment for multiple comparisons
```{r}
#Make table of p-values for main association tests (4 brain outcomes x 2 buffer sizes)
pvals.main.nohomechange.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age 
pvals.age.nohomechange.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by sex
pvals.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex", "Pr(>|t|)"]
  )

#Make table of p-values for all tests of moderation by age and sex
pvals.age.sex.nohomechange.lmm <- c(
  summary(gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(wm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(hpc.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"],
  summary(WMH.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)$coefficients["Time3:Natural_environment_300m_10pcnt:Sex:Age", "Pr(>|t|)"]
)

#show unadjusted p-values
pvals.main.nohomechange.lmm
pvals.age.nohomechange.lmm
pvals.sex.nohomechange.lmm
pvals.age.sex.nohomechange.lmm

#Benjamini-Hochberg, assuming tests are independent
p.adjust(pvals.main.nohomechange.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.nohomechange.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.nohomechange.lmm,method="BH")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.nohomechange.lmm,method="BH")

#Benjamini-Yekutieli, allows for dependency between tests (e.g., overlapping moderators (age and sex) in separate moderation tests for a given outcome)
p.adjust(pvals.main.nohomechange.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.nohomechange.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.sex.nohomechange.lmm,method="BY")
p.adjust(pvals.age.sex.nohomechange.lmm,method="BY")
```

### 7.4.18) Model assumption checks: Sensitivity analysis - Restricted sample with no change in home location

#### Main associations: No change in home location, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Main associations: No change in home location, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.300.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age: No change in home location, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age: No change in home location, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex: Greenpsace, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by biological sex, No change in home location, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.300.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex: No change in home location, 1000m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.nohomechange.lmm)
```

#### Moderation by age and sex: No change in home location, 300m buffer
```{r}
model_diagnostics(gm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(wm.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(hpc.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
model_diagnostics(WMH.sex.age.300.nohomechange.lmm)
```


# 9) Formally test for differences in crude brain volume changes between age, sex, and age*sex groups 

## 9.0) Prepare datasets with median-split binary Age variable
```{r}
#Wide format
explainAgeSex$AgeBinary[explainAgeSex$Age<=54] <- "Younger"
explainAgeSex$AgeBinary[explainAgeSex$Age>54] <- "Older"

#Long format
summary(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long$Age) #median is 54.00
summary(BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2$Age) #median is 0.06292
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3 <- BrainCovWMHTownsend.long2
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3$AgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3$Age<=0.06292] <- "Younger"
BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3$AgeBinary[BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3$Age>0.06292] <- "Older"
```

## 9.1) Grey matter volume

ANOVA on change scores with combined Age*Sex grouping variable (no covariates)
```{r}
gm.change.aov1 <- lm(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ SexAgeBinary, data=explainAgeSex)

Anova(gm.change.aov1, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
summary(emmeans(lm(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1),digits=5)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
summary(pairs(emmeans(gm.change.aov1, ~ SexAgeBinary), adjust = "tukey"), infer=c(TRUE,TRUE))
```

ANOVA on change scores with Age*Sex interaction (no covariates)
```{r}
gm.change.aov <- lm(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ AgeBinary*Sex, data=explainAgeSex)

library(car)
Anova(gm.change.aov, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
emmeans(lm(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
pairs(emmeans(gm.change.aov, ~ Sex | AgeBinary))
pairs(emmeans(gm.change.aov, ~ AgeBinary | Sex))

# Estimated brain changes by Age group only
emmeans(gm.change.aov, ~ AgeBinary)

# Estimated brain changes by Sex only
emmeans(gm.change.aov, ~ Sex)
```

RM-ANOVA on scores at each timepoint (equivalent to LMM without covariates and with random intercepts only)
```{r}
gm.rmaov <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*AgeBinary*Sex + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3, REML=FALSE)

Anova(gm.rmaov, type="III")

# Estimated brain changes over Time, overall
emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, "Time",weights="equal")
confint(pairs(emm))

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age*Sex group 
emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex | AgeBinary)
time_contrast1 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by=c("Sex","AgeBinary"))
confint(time_contrast1)

  #Post-hoc comparisons
  ##Differences across Time, between Sexes, within Age groups
  emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, ~ Time * Sex | AgeBinary)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="AgeBinary")
  summary(time_contrast)
  
  ##Differences across Time, between Age groups, within Sexes
  emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, ~ Time * AgeBinary | Sex)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="Sex")
  summary(time_contrast)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age group only
emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, ~ Time | AgeBinary)
time_contrast2 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="AgeBinary")
confint(time_contrast2)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Sex only
emm <- emmeans(gm.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex)
time_contrast3 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="Sex")
confint(time_contrast3)
```

LMM including covariates
```{r}
gm.simple.lmm <- lmer(Grey_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*AgeBinary*Sex + Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3, REML=FALSE)

Anova(gm.simple.lmm, type="III")

# Estimated brain changes over Time, overall
emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, "Time",weights="equal")
confint(pairs(emm))

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age*Sex group 
emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | Sex | AgeBinary)
time_contrast1 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by=c("Sex","AgeBinary"))
confint(time_contrast1)

  #Post-hoc comparisons
  ##Differences across Time, between Sexes, within Age groups
  emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, ~ Time * Sex | AgeBinary)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="AgeBinary")
  summary(time_contrast)
  
  ##Differences across Time, between Age groups, within Sexes
  emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, ~ Time * AgeBinary | Sex)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="Sex")
  summary(time_contrast)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age group only
emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | AgeBinary)
time_contrast2 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="AgeBinary")
confint(time_contrast2)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Sex only
emm <- emmeans(gm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | Sex)
time_contrast3 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="Sex")
confint(time_contrast3)
```



## 9.2) White matter volume

ANOVA on change scores with combined Age*Sex grouping variable (no covariates)
```{r}
wm.change.aov1 <- lm(White_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ SexAgeBinary, data=explainAgeSex)

Anova(wm.change.aov1, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
emmeans(lm(White_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
summary(pairs(emmeans(wm.change.aov1, ~ SexAgeBinary), adjust = "tukey"), infer=c(TRUE,TRUE))
```


ANOVA on change scores with Age*Sex interaction (no covariates)
```{r}
wm.change.aov <- lm(White_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ AgeBinary*Sex, data=explainAgeSex)

Anova(wm.change.aov, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
emmeans(lm(White_matter_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
pairs(emmeans(wm.change.aov, ~ Sex | AgeBinary))
pairs(emmeans(wm.change.aov, ~ AgeBinary | Sex))

# Estimated brain changes by Age group only
emmeans(wm.change.aov, ~ AgeBinary)

# Estimated brain changes by Sex only
emmeans(wm.change.aov, ~ Sex)
```

RM-ANOVA on scores at each timepoint (equivalent to LMM without covariates and with random intercepts only)
```{r}
wm.rmaov <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*AgeBinary*Sex + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3, REML=FALSE)

Anova(wm.rmaov, type="III")

# Estimated brain changes over Time, overall
emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, "Time",weights="equal")
confint(pairs(emm))

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age*Sex group 
emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex | AgeBinary)
time_contrast1 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by=c("Sex","AgeBinary"))
confint(time_contrast1)

  #Post-hoc comparisons
  ##Differences across Time, between Sexes, within Age groups
  emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, ~ Time * Sex | AgeBinary)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="AgeBinary")
  summary(time_contrast)
  
  ##Differences across Time, between Age groups, within Sexes
  emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, ~ Time * AgeBinary | Sex)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="Sex")
  summary(time_contrast)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age group only
emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, ~ Time | AgeBinary)
time_contrast2 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="AgeBinary")
confint(time_contrast2)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Sex only
emm <- emmeans(wm.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex)
time_contrast3 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="Sex")
confint(time_contrast3)
```

LMM including covariates
```{r}
wm.simple.lmm <- lmer(White_matter_volume_adjusted ~ Time*AgeBinary*Sex + Natural_environment_1000m_10pcnt + time_between_MRIs + time_baseline_to_first_MRI + BMI + Education + Income + Average_time_outdoors + Summed_PA_MET_min + Smoking + Disability + Deprivation_Index + Population_density + CVD_problems + WMH_firstMRI + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3, REML=FALSE)

Anova(wm.simple.lmm, type="III")

# Estimated brain changes over Time, overall
emm <- emmeans(wm.simple.lmm, "Time",weights="equal")
confint(pairs(emm))

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age*Sex group 
emm <- emmeans(wm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | Sex | AgeBinary)
time_contrast1 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by=c("Sex","AgeBinary"))
confint(time_contrast1)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age group only
emm <- emmeans(wm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | AgeBinary)
time_contrast2 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="AgeBinary")
confint(time_contrast2)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Sex only
emm <- emmeans(wm.simple.lmm, ~ Time | Sex)
time_contrast3 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="Sex")
confint(time_contrast3)
```

## 9.3) Hippocampal volume

ANOVA on change scores with combined Age*Sex grouping variable (no covariates)
```{r}
hpc.change.aov1 <- lm(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ SexAgeBinary, data=explainAgeSex)

Anova(hpc.change.aov1, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
emmeans(lm(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
summary(pairs(emmeans(hpc.change.aov1, ~ SexAgeBinary), adjust = "tukey"), infer=c(TRUE,TRUE))
```

ANOVA on change scores with combined Age*Sex grouping variable (no covariates)
```{r}
hpc.change.aov1 <- lm(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ SexAgeBinary, data=explainAgeSex)

Anova(hpc.change.aov1, type="III") #p=0.91 for Age*Sex 

# Estimated brain changes, overall
emmeans(lm(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted_CHANGE ~ 1, data=explainAgeSex), ~1)

# Estimated brain changes by Age*Sex group 
pairs(emmeans(hpc.change.aov1, ~ SexAgeBinary), adjust = "tukey")
```

RM-ANOVA on scores at each timepoint (equivalent to LMM without covariates and with random intercepts only)
```{r}
hpc.rmaov <- lmer(Avg_Hippocampal_volume_adjusted ~ Time*AgeBinary*Sex + (1 | ID), BrainCovWMHTownsend.long3, REML=FALSE)

Anova(hpc.rmaov, type="III")

# Estimated brain changes over Time, overall
emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, "Time",weights="equal")
confint(pairs(emm))

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age*Sex group 
emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex | AgeBinary)
time_contrast1 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by=c("Sex","AgeBinary"))
confint(time_contrast1)

  #Post-hoc comparisons
  ##Differences across Time, between Sexes, within Age groups
  emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, ~ Time * Sex | AgeBinary)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="AgeBinary")
  summary(time_contrast)
  
  ##Differences across Time, between Age groups, within Sexes
  emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, ~ Time * AgeBinary | Sex)
  time_contrast <- contrast(emm,interaction=c("pairwise","pairwise"), by="Sex")
  summary(time_contrast)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Age group only
emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, ~ Time | AgeBinary)
time_contrast2 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="AgeBinary")
confint(time_contrast2)

# Estimated brain changes over Time, by Sex only
emm <- emmeans(hpc.rmaov, ~ Time | Sex)
time_contrast3 <- contrast(emm,method="revpairwise",by="Sex")
confint(time_contrast3)
```

LMM including covariates
